# AuthorizationStatus.notDetermined

**Case**

A person has not chosen whether the app can use FinanceKit services.

## Declaration

```swift
case notDetermined
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **AuthorizationStatus.authorized**: A person authorized the app to use FinanceKit services.
- **AuthorizationStatus.denied**: A person denied the use of FinanceKit services for the app.
